title: Create Advanced Horses
body:
# **Horse Food aka Advanced Horses** 
is a Minecraft mod that adds new food items to the game, giving players more options for sustenance and culinary creativity. With this mod, you can harvest horse meat and create a hearty horse soup to keep your hunger at bay during your adventures.


## **Features:**

**Horse Meat:** After defeating a horse, you can now obtain horse meat, a new raw food item. Cook it in a furnace or a smoker to enjoy a nutritious meal.

**Horse Soup:** Combine cooked horse meat with vegetables in a mixer provided by create to create horse soup, a satisfying and nourishing dish that restores a significant amount of hunger and saturation.

**Balanced Nutrition:** Horse meat and horse soup are balanced to fit seamlessly into the game, providing moderate to high levels of hunger and saturation, ensuring they are valuable additions to your food repertoire.

**Crafting Recipes:** Easy-to-follow recipes for cooking horse meat and crafting horse soup, making it straightforward to integrate these new foods into your Minecraft experience.

**Soup:** Gives you speed for about 10seconds
